common.loadError: Couldn’t load this — the request failed.

sampleData.title: Sample data
sampleData.emptyHint: New here? Load an example pipeline to explore the app, then clear it when you're ready for real data.
sampleData.loadedHint: Your account is filled with sample data. Clear it to start fresh with your own pipeline.
sampleData.clearConfirm: This permanently deletes ALL data in your account — including anything you've added since — and resets it to empty. Your login, API key, and share links are kept. This can't be undone.

apiDocs.title: API reference
apiDocs.intro: Read-only access to your applications using your API key. Base URL:
apiDocs.auth: Send your key as a Bearer token on every request:
apiDocs.getDesc: Get a single application by id (404 if not yours).
apiDocs.fieldsNote: Responses include: id, title, status, company_id, role_type, url, source, notes, applied_at, next_action, next_action_at, deadline_at, fit_score, created_at, updated_at. Salary and compensation are never exposed.
apiDocs.webhookIntro: When an application's status changes, Zenith POSTs this JSON to each of your webhook URLs:
apiDocs.signatureNote: Every delivery carries an X-Zenith-Signature header — a hex HMAC-SHA256 of the raw request body keyed with your webhook secret. Verify it before trusting a payload:

forms.name: Name
forms.salaryRangePlaceholder: freeform, e.g. from a job posting
forms.title: Title

empty.noCompanies: No companies yet. Add the ones you're targeting — applications and contacts link to them.
empty.noPeople: No people yet. Add recruiters and hiring managers so you can log every touchpoint.
empty.feedNothingNew: Nothing new. Feed checks automatically every 6 hours, or hit “Check now”.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Desktop.
shortcuts.closeHelp: Close a form or this help

settings.title: Settings
settings.calendarLinkHint: Add this URL as a subscribed calendar in Google/Outlook/Apple Calendar — follow-ups, deadlines, and interviews stay in sync automatically. Read-only, updates whenever your calendar app refreshes.
settings.calendarPrivacyWarning: This feed names the roles and companies you're interviewing with. Add it only to a private, personal calendar — never a shared or work account. Regenerate the link if it may have leaked.
settings.regenerateLinkConfirm: Regenerate this link? The current link stops working immediately for anyone you've shared it with.
settings.disableLinkConfirm: Disable this link? The current link stops working for anyone you've shared it with.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage users, invites, and maintenance tools.

feed.pulledFrom: Pulled from your configured job boards (Greenhouse, Ashby) and Adzuna every 6 hours.
feed.triageHint: j / k move · a add · d dismiss
feed.skillsMatchHint: Skills from your CV mentioned in this posting
feed.noFitMatch: No jobs match this fit filter — lower it to see more.

stats.momentumDetail: {{recent}} stage advances in the last 2 weeks vs {{prior}} in the 2 weeks before that
stats.pipelineFunnel: Pipeline funnel — applications that reached each stage
stats.timeToOffer_one: Typical time to offer: {{count}} day, based on {{n}} of your offers
stats.timeToOffer_other: Typical time to offer: {{count}} days, based on {{n}} of your offers

streak.brokenBody: That's fine — job searches aren't linear. Your best is still on record whenever you're ready to pick it back up.

journal.title: Wins journal
journal.placeholder: Log a small win — good feedback, a strong interview…

stats.responseRate: {{responded}} of {{applied}} applications advanced past “applied” — {{pct}}% response rate
stats.compareEmpty: Nothing at interview or offer stage yet. Add min/max/currency on a job's edit form once it gets there.

templates.empty: No templates yet. Add a few starters to get going.
templates.bodyPlaceholder: Write your message… use the placeholders below.

followUp.name: Follow-up
followUp.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks again for your time. I wanted to follow up and reiterate my interest in opportunities at {{company}} — happy to share anything that would help.

Best,
{{my_name}}

thankYou.name: Thank-you
thankYou.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for the conversation today — I really enjoyed learning more about the team at {{company}}, and it reinforced my enthusiasm for the role.

Best,
{{my_name}}

referral.name: Referral ask
referral.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I’m exploring roles at {{company}} and your name came up. Would you be open to a quick chat, or to pointing me toward the right person? I’d really appreciate it.

Thanks,
{{my_name}}

intro.name: Intro / networking
intro.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I came across your work at {{company}} and would love to connect. I’m currently exploring opportunities in the space and always keen to learn from people doing it well.

Best,
{{my_name}}

onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.profile: Fill out your CV profile basics
onboarding.sampleLink: Prefer to explore first? Load sample data

prep.title: Interview prep
prep.starterResearch: Research the interviewer's background and the team
prep.starterStories: Prepare STAR examples for common questions

mockInterview.title: Mock interview (AI)
mockInterview.hint: Practice with an AI interviewer for this role, using your own Anthropic key. It asks one question at a time and gives feedback on each answer.

negotiation.title: Salary negotiation (AI)
negotiation.hint: Rehearse the offer conversation with an AI hiring manager, using your own Anthropic key. It makes an offer, pushes back, and coaches you on each move.

ai.needKey: Add your own Anthropic API key to use this.
ai.groundedReady: This job has a description — the AI sessions below are grounded in it.
ai.groundedMissing: Add a job description to ground the AI sessions below in this specific role.

coverLetter.title: Cover letter
coverLetter.placeholder: Write or generate a cover letter draft for this application…
coverLetter.summaryPlaceholder: [add a professional summary in your CV profile to improve this draft]
coverLetter.body:
I'm writing to apply for the {{title}} role at {{company}}. {{summary}}

I'd welcome the chance to discuss how my background fits this role.

ats.noKeywords: No known skills detected in this description

detail.jobDescriptionPlaceholder: Paste the job description here — kept even if the posting is edited or taken down.
detail.possibleDuplicate: You already have an open application at this company: “{{title}}”. Saving will add a separate one.
detail.pasteJdPlaceholder: Paste the job description to check it against your CV skills…
detail.keywordMatchCount: Your CV mentions {{matched}} of {{total}} keywords found in this posting

cv.tailorHint: Paste a job description; suggestions rewrite your summary and each role to emphasise the most relevant experience — using your own Anthropic key. Nothing is invented.
cv.name: Name

posting.staleHint: This posting may no longer be live — worth a quick check.

offer.title: Offer details
offer.negotiationComp: - The total comp estimate on this offer is ~{{amount}}.
offer.negotiationCompeting: - I have a competing offer from {{company}} to weigh against this.
offer.negotiationBelowMarket: - This offer tracks ~{{pct}}% below the median of my other offers for this role — worth raising.
offer.negotiationClose: - Ask: is there flexibility on base, signing bonus, or equity before I give a final answer?

feedSettings.atsBoardsHint: Watch a specific company's own Greenhouse or Ashby board directly — no keyword matching, every listing on that board shows up. Use the board's slug from its careers URL (e.g. boards.greenhouse.io/{slug} or jobs.ashbyhq.com/{slug}).

login.subtitle: Sign in to your pipeline
login.title: Welcome back
login.error: Couldn't sign in — check your email and password.
login.inviteOnly: Accounts are invite-only. Ask your admin for access.
login.enterTwoFactorCode: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
login.enterBackupCode: Enter one of your backup codes.

account.testPushHint: Send yourself a sample push to verify delivery. On iOS, web push only works from an app installed to the Home Screen (iOS 16.4+), never a browser tab.
account.testPushNoSub: No push subscription found — enable notifications first (on iOS, install to the Home Screen).
account.aiKeyHint: Add your own Anthropic API key to enable AI features (like CV tailoring). Your CV and the job description are sent to Anthropic under your key when you use them; Zenith stores the key encrypted and never in plain text.
account.aiFeatureTailor: Tailor your CV to a job description
account.aiFeatureInterview: Practise a mock interview per application
account.aiFeatureNegotiation: Rehearse a salary negotiation per application
account.inviteSuccess: Account created for {{email}}. Share the temporary password with them directly.
account.resetDemoError: Couldn't reset demo data — has the demo account been invited yet?
account.apiKeyHint: Read-only access to your applications at GET /api/v1/applications — send it as “Authorization: Bearer <key>”.
account.webhooksHint: Get a signed POST whenever an application's status changes.
account.webhookSecretHint: Signing secret — shown once, save it now. Verify deliveries with the X-Zenith-Signature header (HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body):
account.pushEnabledHint: This browser will get a system notification for due follow-ups, stale postings, and new Feed matches.
account.pushDisabledHint: Get a system notification on this device for due follow-ups, stale postings, and new Feed matches — even when Zenith isn't open.
account.pushError: Couldn't do that — check your browser's notification permission.
account.pushNotConfigured: Push isn't set up on this server yet.
account.twoFactorEnabledHint: 2FA is on. Disabling it removes the authenticator-app requirement at login.
account.twoFactorDisabledHint: Add an authenticator-app code as a second step at login.
account.twoFactorError: Couldn't do that — check your password.
account.twoFactorScanHint: Add this secret to your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, etc.):
account.twoFactorBackupCodesHint: Save these backup codes somewhere safe — each works once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
account.twoFactorVerifyError: That code didn't verify. 2FA is still enabled — try again.
account.changePasswordSuccess: Password changed. Other sessions were signed out.
account.changePasswordError: Couldn't change password — check your current password.
account.tempPasswordSet: Temporary password for {{email}}: {{password}} — share it securely; they can change it in Settings.
account.twoFactorReset: 2FA reset for {{email}} — they can now sign in with just their password.
account.removeUserConfirm: Remove {{email}}? Their account and all their data are permanently deleted.
account.regenerateKeyConfirm: Regenerate the API key? The current key stops working immediately and any tool using it must be updated.
account.revokeKeyConfirm: Disable the API key? Any tool using it stops working.
account.deleteHint: Permanently deletes your account and all your data — applications, companies, contacts, CV, everything. This can't be undone.
account.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete your account and ALL your data? This cannot be undone.
account.webhookDisabled: disabled after repeated failures — delete and re-add to retry

activityFeed.empty: Nothing yet. Status changes, logged touchpoints, and attached documents all show up here.

overview.noActivity: Nothing yet — add your first job to get started.

confirm.deleteRoleType: Delete role type “{{label}}”? Feed keywords for it go too.

calendar.empty: Nothing on the agenda yet. Due dates, logged touchpoints, and applied dates all show up here.

attention.overdueHint: The follow-up date has passed — act on it or reschedule.
attention.staleHint: The posting may be gone — the URL no longer answers like a live listing.
attention.quietHint: No activity from their side for a while — consider a nudge.

dashboard.caughtUp: All caught up — no follow-ups due
